#[derive(Clone)]
struct Record {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    status: Status,
}

#[derive(Clone, PartialEq)]
enum Status {
    Active,
    Inactive,
    Pending,
}

fn get_active_names(records: &[Record]) -> Vec<String> {
    // GOOD: filter by reference, clone only what passes
    records
        .iter()
        .filter(|r| r.status == Status::Active)
        .map(|r| r.name.clone())
        .collect()
}
